examples: The flame of my rage will incinerate you.
Maybe so, but you can't incinerate a Bengal tiger with a magnifying glass.
If your craft is powered by solid or liquid fuel, chances are it will ignite and incinerate you.
Given his druthers, he says, he prefers to incinerate regulations than promulgate them.
If the most usual way of treating the placenta in the West is to incinerate it, there are other cultures in which it has a special place in rituals following a birth.
